description_long: This object is a modern row of multi-story townhouses arranged in a stepped, linear configuration. The buildings feature flat roofs, large rectangular windows, and a mix of white, gray, and wood-textured exterior panels. Each unit appears to have a private entrance, with some units including small balconies or terraces. The ground level is elevated with green patches suggesting landscaped yards or gardens. The overall design is geometric and modular, with repeating elements and clean lines. The rear and side facades are less detailed, focusing on privacy and minimalism.
description: A row of modern, multi-story townhouses with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and wood-textured panels. The design is geometric, modular, and features landscaped green areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, entrances, and large windows of the townhouses, with visible green landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped arrangement and the depth of the row, with minimal window detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, which are simpler and have fewer windows and less ornamentation.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the front and side, emphasizing the modular repetition and green spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Private ground-level entrances with minimal overhangs, some featuring small steps and wood-accented doors.
